summary: Comprehensive onboarding audit completed. Created test employee OCS-0006, tested all requirement types (documents, training, internal checks), verified Upload→View→Download→Approve flow, tested document control (Replace/Remove/Edit/History). All 26 backend tests passed. UI is functional with minor count discrepancy in Overview.

minor.issue: Returns 404 'Not Found' when trying to approve some requirements - may be file accessibility check failing

ui_bugs.issue: Count discrepancy between header (1/23 approved, 8 ready, 14 missing) and Care Status cards (1 approved, 5 ready, 1 missing)

passed_tests: ✅ STEP 1: Created test employee 'Audit Test Employee' as Healthcare Assistant (OCS-0006)
✅ STEP 2: What's Needed checklist displays all 6 categories correctly
✅ STEP 3A: Employee Documents - ID, RTW, DBS uploads work correctly
✅ STEP 3B: Internal Checks - RTW verification, DBS update service check uploads work
✅ STEP 4: Training Certificates - Safeguarding, Manual Handling, Infection Control, BLS uploads work
✅ STEP 5: UI audit - No duplicate buttons, labels are clear, statuses are consistent
✅ STEP 6: Status transitions work - Still Needed → Ready for Review → Checked & Approved
✅ STEP 7: Overview tab shows compliance summary (with minor count discrepancy)
✅ STEP 8: Error handling - Invalid file types handled, approve without file prevented
✅ STEP 9: Document Control - Replace File, Remove File, Edit Details, View History all present
✅ Compliance score updates correctly after uploads (0% → 39%)
✅ Upload Document dialog shows categorized requirements with evidence counts
✅ Three-dot menu on requirements shows Edit Details, Replace File, Remove File, View History
✅ Three-dot menu on employee shows Edit Details, Refresh Status, Export options, Archive/Delete

works_perfectly: Employee creation with auto-generated employee code
All 6 compliance categories displayed (Legal & Safety, Core Training, Role Readiness, Employment, Agreements, Admin/Other)
Upload Document dialog with categorized dropdown
View/Download buttons on requirements with evidence
Three-dot menu with document control options
Status badges (Checked & Approved, Ready for Review, Still Needed)
Internal vs Employee document distinction (Internal badge)
Training certificate upload with expiry dates
minor_issues: Overview Care Status counts don't match What's Needed checklist counts
Approve button sometimes shows 'Not Found' error (file accessibility check)

action_items: Investigate count discrepancy between Overview Care Status and What's Needed checklist
Review file accessibility check in verify-all endpoint to prevent false 404 errors
critical_code_review_comments: ComplianceOverview.js uses different data source than What's Needed checklist - should use same compliance calculation
The COMPLIANCE_ITEMS in ComplianceOverview.js only has 9 items while MANDATORY_ITEMS in server.py has 23+ items
seed_data_creation: Created test employee OCS-0006 'Audit Test Employee' with Healthcare Assistant role. Uploaded test documents for: Identity Documents (3), Right to Work Documents (2), DBS Certificate (1), RTW Verification (1), DBS Update Service Check (1), Safeguarding Training (1), Manual Handling Training (1), Infection Control Training (1), BLS Training (1)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full onboarding audit completed. Test employee OCS-0006 (ID: 77b42381-d28a-48a0-a0f1-9469953bdb15) has 39% compliance with 9 documents uploaded. All 6 categories tested. Document control menu (Edit/Replace/Remove/History) verified. Minor issue: ComplianceOverview.js shows different counts than What's Needed checklist because it uses a hardcoded COMPLIANCE_ITEMS list with only 9 items instead of the full MANDATORY_ITEMS from backend.

compliance_audit_summary.upload_flow: Working - categorized dropdown with evidence counts
compliance_audit_summary.view_download_flow: Working - buttons visible on requirements with evidence
compliance_audit_summary.approve_flow: Working with occasional 404 error on file check
